device_name: GI Genius Module 100 (GGM100.US); GI Genius Module 200 (GGM200.US); ColonPRO 4.0 (CPRO40.US)
intended_use: The GI Genius™ system is a computer-assisted reading tool designed to aid endoscopists in detecting colonic mucosal lesions (such as polyps and adenomas) in real time during standard white-light endos
intended_use_full: The GI Genius™ system is a computer-assisted reading tool designed to aid endoscopists in detecting colonic mucosal lesions (such as polyps and adenomas) in real time during standard white-light endoscopy examinations of patients undergoing screening and surveillance endoscopic mucosal evaluations. The GI Genius™ computer-assisted detection device is limited for use with standard white-light endoscopy imaging only. This device is not intended to replace clinical decision making.
ground_truth: not explicitly stated in document; reference standard assumed to be endoscopic findings from predicate device validation (DEN200055)
other_metrics: Lesion-based sensitivity (predicate: 86.5%), Frame-level true positive rate mean 60.14% (predicate: 58.30%), False positive rate per frame mean 1.79% (predicate: 1.96%), False positive clusters per patient <500ms: 97 (predicate: 106), >500ms: 10 (predicate: 11), Video delay 1.52 µs (Module 100) and 0.74 µs (Module 200)
